text: I love you more than coffee, but please don't make me prove it.
author: Unknown

text: You're the reason I look down at my phone and smile. Then walk into a pole.
author: Unknown

text: I love you with all my butt. I would say heart, but my butt is bigger.
author: Unknown

text: You make me smile so much my face hurts — and I still can't stop.
author: Unknown

text: You're my favourite notification.
author: Unknown

text: I'd pick you even if I were the last person on Earth and there was no one else. That's how much I like you.
author: Unknown

text: You're the cheese to my macaroni.
author: Unknown

text: I love you even when I'm hungry — and that's saying something.
author: Unknown

text: If you were a vegetable, you'd be a cute-cumber.
author: Unknown

text: Being deeply loved by someone gives you strength, but loving you gives me laughter.
author: Unknown

text: You make my heart do that stupid little flip thing.
author: Unknown

text: You're my favourite person to do absolutely nothing with.
author: Unknown

text: I love you more than pizza — and I'm being completely serious.
author: Unknown

text: You had me at 'we can stay home'.
author: Unknown

text: Loving you is the easiest thing I do all day.
author: Unknown

text: I'd choose you over Wi-Fi. That's true love.
author: Unknown

text: You're my favourite weirdo.
author: Unknown

text: Every love story is beautiful, but ours is my favourite comedy.
author: Unknown

text: I love you more than yesterday. Yesterday you really got on my nerves.
author: Unknown

text: You're the person I want to annoy for the rest of my life.
author: Unknown

text: You laugh at my terrible jokes like they're the best thing you've heard all day, and I catch myself doing the same with yours.
author: Unknown

text: Watching you dance in the kitchen while burning dinner is my favorite kind of chaos.
author: Unknown

text: You text me the most mundane updates, and I realize these are the moments that anchor me.
author: Unknown
